title: stenostephanus densiflorus
intro: Stenostephanus densiflorus, also known as the dwarf lantana, is a shrub-like plant species native to tropical Africa and Asia, characterized by its small white flowers and dense foliage. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Stenostephanus densiflorus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water or using its essential oils in topical applications, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
